summary: Frontend testing completed for dashboard widget hover actions feature parity with ChartsPage cards. All 6 new hover action buttons (Star/Favorite, Maximize/View, Sparkles/AI Insights, Download/Export, Settings/Edit, Trash/Delete) are implemented and working correctly. AI Insights button correctly only appears on chart widgets, not stat cards. Existing features (cross-filtering, drill-down, drag-and-drop) remain functional.

hover_action_buttons_presence: PASS: All 6 hover action buttons visible on widget hover
PASS: Buttons appear via CSS opacity transition (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100)
PASS: Button icons: Star, Maximize2, Sparkles, Download, Settings, Trash2 (from lucide-react)
star_favorite_button: PASS: Toast 'Added to favorites' on favorite
PASS: Toast 'Removed from favorites' on unfavorite
PASS: Star fills with amber color (fill-amber-500 text-amber-500) when favorited
PASS: Star returns to outline when unfavorited
maximize_expand_button: PASS: Opens fullscreen modal with widget content
PASS: Modal has 'Export' button in header
PASS: Modal has 'AI Insights' button for chart widgets
PASS: Modal has X close button
PASS: Click outside modal closes it
ai_insights_sparkles_button: PASS: Button only appears on chart widgets (bar, pie, etc.)
PASS: Button NOT present on stat card widgets (correct behavior)
PASS: Opens AI Insights panel with 'Analyzing data...' loading state
PASS: Panel shows 'AI Insights Beta' header
PASS: Panel can be closed with X button
export_download_button: PASS: Downloads widget data as JSON file
edit_settings_button: PASS: Dialog contains Widget Title input
PASS: Dialog contains Data Source dropdown
PASS: Dialog contains Chart Type dropdown
PASS: Dialog contains X-Axis Field dropdown
delete_trash_button: PASS: Button present with red color (text-destructive)
PASS: Button has title='Delete' for accessibility
existing_features: PASS: Drill badge visible on widgets with drilldown hierarchy
PASS: Drag handle (.drag-handle) present for drag-and-drop
PASS: Cross-filtering creates 'Filtered' badge on other widgets
PASS: Drill-down creates 'Drilled' badge and breadcrumb navigation

critical_code_review_comments: Line 740-809: Hover action buttons well-implemented with proper event stopping (e.stopPropagation)
Line 765-775: AI Insights button conditionally rendered only for widget.type === 'chart'
Line 1077-1123: Handler functions properly implemented for all hover actions
Line 1395-1460: Expanded widget modal includes Export and AI Insights buttons as expected
Widget favorites stored in client-side state (widgetFavorites) - not persisted to backend

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all hover action features working correctly

test_dashboard.name: Cross-Filter Test Dashboard
widgets: Sales by Region (bar chart with drill)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard widget hover actions feature parity complete. All 6 buttons tested and working: Star (toggles favorite with toast), Maximize (fullscreen modal), Sparkles (AI Insights for charts only), Download (JSON export), Settings (Edit dialog), Trash (Delete). Buttons appear via CSS opacity transition on group-hover. widgetFavorites state is client-side only.
mocked_apis: None - all features use real endpoints
